contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the contract and all its reviews and invoices. This cannot be undone.
contracts.importCsvHint: Required columns: customer_name, facility_name, contract_number, review_frequency, start_date

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.noReviewThisMonth: No review created for this month yet.
reviews.dropOrClick: Drag & drop or click to select document
reviews.noEmailConfigured: No email address configured — document will only be saved.
reviews.resetConfirm: Reset this completed review? The pending invoice will be deleted and a new upload will be allowed.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.noInvoiceEmail: No invoice email configured — please add an invoice email address to the contract.

saveOnly.post: Invoice delivery is by post — document will be saved only, no email sent.
saveOnly.e_invoice: Invoice delivery is e-invoice — document will be saved only, no email sent.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pageDesc: Configure your application, email, storage and backup settings
settings.generalDesc: Application name, default language and accounting contact
settings.smtpDesc: Outbound email used for review reports and invoice notifications
settings.smtpFromHint: Appears in the "From" field of every outgoing email
settings.smtpTestDesc: Send a test email to verify your SMTP settings are working
settings.smbDesc: Network file share (Samba / Windows) where PDF review reports are saved
settings.smbHostHint: IP address or hostname of the file server
settings.smbBasePathHint: Subfolder within the share — files are organized by customer and facility
settings.smbUsernameHint: User with write access to the share
settings.templatesDesc: Email templates for review reports (sent to customers) and accounting emails. One per type can be marked as default.
settings.templatesEmpty: No templates yet. Create one to get started.
settings.templateDefaultHint: Automatically pre-select this template when uploading a review or sending to accounting
settings.backupDesc: Automated database backups to protect your data
settings.backupEnabledHint: Run automatic backups on the configured schedule
settings.backupScheduleHint: Cron expression — 0 2 * * * = every day at 02:00 · 0 2 * * 0 = every Sunday
settings.backupPathHint: Relative to the application root, or an absolute path on the server
settings.backupFilesDesc: Existing backups stored at the configured path
settings.appNameHint: Shown in the browser tab title and outgoing email templates
settings.defaultLanguageHint: Default language applied to new user accounts
settings.accountingEmailHint: Invoices are forwarded to this address when sent to accounting
settings.logoDesc: Upload your company logo — shown on the login screen and in PDF reports
settings.logoHint: PNG, JPG or SVG · Max 5 MB

facility.title: Facility
facility.basicInfoDesc: Customer contact details and facility location
facility.contractInfoDesc: Contract terms, billing settings and review schedule
facility.smbPathDesc: Override the default network storage path for this contract's documents
facility.smbPathHint: Leave empty to use the default SMB base path configured in Settings
facility.customMonthsHint: Select the specific months when maintenance reviews are scheduled
facility.valueHint: Amount charged per individual review visit (excl. VAT)
facility.valueYearHint: Total contract value for the full calendar year (excl. VAT)
facility.customerEmailHint: For sending review PDF reports. Separate multiple addresses with commas.
facility.invoiceEmailHint: For sending invoice PDFs. Falls back to review email if empty. Separate multiple addresses with commas.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Export maintenance reports as PDF or Excel
reports.monthlyDesc: All reviews completed within the selected month
reports.yearlyDesc: Consolidated annual report for all contracts

errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this.
errors.accounting_email_not_configured: Accounting email is not configured in settings.
errors.no_document: No document found for this review.
errors.email_taken: Email address is already in use.
errors.contract_number_taken: Contract number is already in use.
